news.t: From Field to Shelf: The ETF Response to Volatile Food Prices
What exactly are patients taking new weight-loss drugs eating and what are they avoiding? Bernstein asked them.
Foodservice group forecasts $24 billion in losses due to coronavirus, asks for government relief package
Charts Suggest It's Time to Buy Food and Beverage Stocks

holdings.infoBox: PBJ is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Monster Beverage stock at 5.35%, PepsiCo at 5.05%, Starbucks at 5.04%, Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 5.03%, and The Coca-Cola Company at 5.02%.

overview.description: The Invesco Food & Beverage ETF (PBJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund tracks a multi-factor, tiered equal-weighted index of US food industry stocks. PBJ was launched on Jun 23, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
